# OAuth2

Standard OAuth2 reference.

## Flows

There are four primary flows.

### Authorization code

Most common. Uses ![[shared/snippet#example]] as a reference.

### Implicit

Deprecated.

### Resource owner password

Avoid.

### Client credentials

Server-to-server.
